up.method: model median flux, flux sampling DMM (Table 2); NOT measured

mfa.note: model median; markedly higher N demand
model median; highest O2 demand of the three strains

growth_records.cite: Carolina A. Contador et al. Use of genome-scale models to get new insights into the marine actinomycete genus Salinispora. BMC Systems Biology (2019). DOI:10.1186/s12918-019-0683-1. [PMC6341766]
growth_records.method: experimentally observed growth in DMM; numeric mu not reported in main text
growth_records.snippet: Median flux values... Glucose -0.98539... Ammonium -10.491... Oxygen -15.145 (SP-CNR114).
growth_records.notes: Model (flux-sampling) uptake fluxes under DMM, is_experimental=false. Growth in DMM confirmed in vitro; no numeric mu in main text. SP-CNR114 model predicts much higher ammonium and oxygen uptake than ST/SA. Core pan-model column in Table 2 excluded (not a real organism/strain).
